User.title: User Profile
User.description: Public profile information for a user.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

Post.title: Forum Post
Post.description: A post shared by a user in the forum.

authorId.description: UID of the user who created the post.

authorName.description: Display name of the author at the time of posting.

location.description: Optional geographical location of the post.

likesCount.description: Number of likes on the post.

commentsCount.description: Number of comments on the post.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the post was created.

Comment.title: Post Comment
Comment.description: A comment on a specific post.

postId.description: ID of the post being commented on.

authorId.description: UID of the user who commented.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the comment was created.

Like.title: Post Like
Like.description: A like record to track which user liked which post.

userId.description: UID of the user who liked the post.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the like was created.

Following.title: Following
Following.description: Represents a user following another user.

followerId.description: UID of the user who is following.

followingId.description: UID of the user being followed.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: A notification for a user about an interaction (like/comment).

recipientId.description: UID of the user receiving the notification.

senderId.description: UID of the user who triggered the notification.

senderName.description: Name of the user who triggered it.

postId.description: ID of the relevant post (or 'system' for non-post events).

read.description: Whether the notification has been read.

Conversation.title: Conversation
Conversation.description: A message thread between two users.

participantNames.description: Map of participant UIDs to names.

participantPhotos.description: Map of participant UIDs to photo URLs.

lastSenderId.description: UID of the user who sent the last message.

unreadCount.description: Map of participant UIDs to their unread message count.

Message.title: Private Message
Message.description: A direct message in a conversation.

/posts/{postId}/likes/{userId}.description: Likes on a specific post, indexed by user ID to prevent duplicate likes.

/users/{userId}/following/{followingId}.description: Users that a specific user is following.

/users/{userId}/followers/{followerId}.description: Users that are following a specific user.
